transcript.text:
[Fishing boat restaurant]
Do you have abalone?
[I'll go catch it]
[Meat for the customer while they wait!]
Enjoy your meal Thank you
[Super premium restaurant service]
Hello everyone
Today I'm at.. Should I say "Fishing boat restaurant"?
I'm here to eat some steak on the boat
[Tomahwak & T-bone Steak (About 3kgs)]
Enjoy your meal Thank you
Wow, that looks delicious
Amazing
I've never dreamed of eating steak on board like this
Maybe like on a cruise, but not like this
This is a fishing boat

Anyways, bon appetit!
There's asparagus here
[Scoot scoot]
What? We're moving
[Waves 'hello']
Oh, they're saying Hi back
Let's get the sauce
On the side
I wanted some wine, but brought grape juice instead
That's good This should go well with the meal
This is huge
This is almost like..
How do I say this?
Well-done
This is well-done
Really delicious

I like my steak cooked rare, but this is still outstanding
It's still very soft
Captain, this tastes really good!
Thank you
There's more!
Here's the galbi (ribs) Galbi!? lol
Thank you
This is cooked well too
He did a really good job cooking this
Let's get a bite of the tomahawk steak
A big piece
Amazing
Cooked really well
Was this the sirloin? tenderloin?
He said there were different parts
Let's try to find out if it's the sirloin or the tenderloin

This side is very chewy And over here is very soft
Yummy
For the tomahwak, from over here to over is the ribeye cap
Ribeye cap
It's a very delicious part
He made knife marks for me to cut with easy
It might not look like it, but the meat is very tender
Ribeye cap
Ta-da
Looks really good
[She is here with the abalone]
Wow, it's huge!
[Natural Abalone]
It takes like 5-6 years for it to get this big
Thank you
I'll go ahead and cook this for you

Here, come take a bite
That looks delicious
Tasty!
I kind of feel bad eating by myself
I can't eat animals that eat grass because of allergies
[You enjoy your food]
I would taste better cooked on a charcoal
DId she bite her tongue?
I bit my tongue because the food was so good
Well, not my tongue, but the inside part of my lower lip
[Delicious abalone on standby]
[Natural butter-grilled abalone]
[A dishcloth is a must!]
Abalone is here, Already!? Amazing
[The best fishing boat restaurant]
Thank you

Enjoy your meal
Wow, that looks so good
I saw her eat like 3 plates of mackerel
The abalone is huge!
You have a huge stomach too
So big!
Bon appetit!
This fresh-caught abalone is so tasty
It's on a different level Very chewy
She's so good at eating
[Thank you]
The ribeye cap is very delicious
The abalone is so fresh
Really
Do you want me to go catch more for you?
No no, this is more than enough Very delicious

[Exaggerates] This is for like 50 people!
So surprising
To be honest, this part needs to be cooked a little more
Should I cook that part for you?
It's really okay
Yes, just this part The bone
Thank you so much
The T-bone is cooked to the bone
It's because the T-bone steak is not as thick as the Tomahawk steak
I gathered all the meat here
[Watching her mukbang live]
I'm not even on a cruise
I must be the only one that eats steak like this on a fishing boat
I'm wearing a swimsuit right now Should I go in the water?
Do you want to go in the water?
What will happen if I do?

If you do, you won't be able to come back
Really?
Are you really going to go in?
Is there a shark?
The boat is filled with people that can rescue you
Jellyfish! There are a lot of jellyfish here
What if I get stung?
It hurts It hurts very much
[Okay, eating is the best]
[Cooking the Tomahawk steak bone]
Thank you!
[Takes the raw meat]
It's so good
It's amazing
It's really good
It's perfectly seasoned too!

It's just about right
You know when you're eating after playing in the water
You don't really care what's on your face and stuff
It's like that right now
All done!
You finished it?
Abalone too
Let's get it
Wow, thank you!
The abalone tastes the best
This is going to be so tasty
Amazing
It tastes so good Did you salt it?
He salted it and it's perfect
You're such a good cook!
[Finishing it up with grape juice]

That was a good meal
I ate steak on a fishing boat for the first time in my life
First and foremost, I want to thank the Captain Chef that did a really good job
And also the woman diver that caught the fresh abalone for me
Thank you very very much
I really have a nice time here
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
